name: Support account contact change policy example
answer:
Customers must verify the current email address before support changes the account email.
Support changes the account email after 2 hours of identity verification.
Customers can request a free password manager from support.
answerLabel: Support account contact change reviewer packet

sources.title: Support Account Contact Change Policy
sources.content:
Customers must verify the current email address before support changes the account email.
Support changes the account email only after 24 hours of identity verification.
